params.name: Secret Tea Recipe
params.description:
No one knows exactly where the recipe came from. Thousands of tea brew masters have tried to find out its secret, but none were able to replicate the recipe.

One day, a frustrated dev monkey, who didn’t know what to design for the Relic to celebrate two million downloads, threw in a fit of rage every food found across the eight Realms into a blender…
